title: elymus sajanensis subsp. coeruleus
intro: Elymus sajanensis subsp. coeruleus, also known as Sajan blue wheat grass or blue wheat grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Russia and China. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elymus sajanensis subsp. coeruleus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
